arts.ttl: John Stones in, Jeremy Doku out: Man City squad for PSG as Rodri travels
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has named a 21-man squad to face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League

arts.ttl: 'He has it all': Manchester City told they've now signed a top talent who's truly 'complete'
arts.sum: Manchester City have been busy in the January transfer window, getting two signings over the line with another one said to be on the way....

arts.ttl: I know Man City's next signing will be a success - because Pep Guardiola did the same thing with me
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to announce the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush this week and he has the backing from Blues legend Sergio Aguero.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hopeful William Saliba will be fit in time for Man City clash
arts.sum: Saliba will not be available for Arsenal’s penultimate Champions League group match against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola’s Man City reach agreement to sign starring La Liga youngster
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are all set to sign an up-and-coming member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Real Valladolid. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…

arts.ttl: I saw what Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis did in strange first Man City training session
arts.sum: Manchester City announced the £63m double signing of Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis this week, with both youngsters training for the first time on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona offered chance to sign PSG star in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona were recently contacted by super agent Jorge Mendes, over a potential deal for one of his clients. That’s according to Diario Sport, citing El Chiringuito TV,…

arts.ttl: I rattled entire PSG team with fake post - they still tried to sign me but I chose Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland returns to the stadium where he upset a whole team in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker and Annie Kilner build 'dream mansion' as they 'escape' Lauryn Goodman with Italy move
arts.sum: Manchester City star Kyle Walker is edging towards a move to join Italian giants AC Milan but it appears that the England defender already has one eye on returning to his home country at some point

arts.ttl: Enrique must outwit Guardiola when PSG meets Man City in Champions League
arts.sum: Guardiola won the Champions League again with City in 2023, while Enrique’s PSG reached the semifinals last season. He must now outwit him when Paris Saint-Germain faces Manchester City in the Champions League on Wednesday, in a match both teams must win to avoid the prospect of early elimination in the new-look format.
